title: Use firearms for pest control activities from aircraft
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use firearms for pest control activities from aircraft demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Undertake pre-flight procedures

pcs.text: Confirm location and boundaries for the activities with pilot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm location and boundaries for the activities with pilot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm location and boundaries for the activities with pilot.

pcs.text: Obtain appropriate approvals and permits to conduct pest control activity according to regulations and the Civil Aviation Safety Authority (CASA)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain appropriate approvals and permits to conduct pest control activity according to regulations and the Civil Aviation Safety Authority (CASA)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain appropriate approvals and permits to conduct pest control activity according to regulations and the Civil Aviation Safety Authority (CASA).

pcs.text: Check time and duration of flight and notify relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check time and duration of flight and notify relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check time and duration of flight and notify relevant personnel.

pcs.text: Confirm flight plans and search and rescue operations with the pilot and ground crew
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm flight plans and search and rescue operations with the pilot and ground crew?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm flight plans and search and rescue operations with the pilot and ground crew.

pcs.text: Check on-board emergency equipment with pilot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check on-board emergency equipment with pilot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check on-board emergency equipment with pilot.

pcs.text: Check emergency landing procedures with pilot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check emergency landing procedures with pilot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check emergency landing procedures with pilot.

pcs.text: Check landing-site requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check landing-site requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check landing-site requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm intent to approach or leave the aircraft with pilot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm intent to approach or leave the aircraft with pilot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm intent to approach or leave the aircraft with pilot.

pcs.text: Approach aircraft according to aircraft and workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Approach aircraft according to aircraft and workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Approach aircraft according to aircraft and workplace health and safety procedures.
